[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 10000110 3
3 00101111 5
4 01001001 3
5 10111000 4
6 01101000 3
7 11100011 5

70 00000001 1
